name: wishful-drinking
description: Carrie Fisher's hilariously candid memoir of Hollywood royalty, Princess Leia, addiction, bipolar disorder, and learning to laugh through it all.
useCase: Understand the life and perspective of Carrie Fisher — addiction recovery, mental health advocacy, and how humor survives trauma.
knownRisks: Memoir — not a clinical guide to addiction or bipolar disorder
Some material is very personal and may trigger readers
Fisher's humor can be dark and irreverent
